stories.title: The Great Ark of Nuh (AS)
stories.short: How Prophet Nuh built a massive ship and saved the believers.
stories.moral: Always have patience and trust in Allah's plan.
stories.content: Prophet Nuh (AS) spent many years calling people to Allah. When the great flood came, Allah commanded him to build an Ark...

stories.title: Yunus (AS) and the Whale
stories.short: The story of repentance from deep within the ocean.
stories.moral: Never lose hope in Allah's mercy.
stories.content: Prophet Yunus (AS) was swallowed by a giant fish. In the darkness, he prayed to Allah with all his heart...
